title: Welcome to ARTIDOM: European Woodworking Hub
excerpt: Discover how our Montenegro facility is changing the B2B furniture landscape.
content: For 25 years, we have been crafting bespoke furniture solutions for HoReCa and commercial spaces. Our facility in Montenegro allows us to combine European quality standards with Mediterranean craftsmanship. We source premium wood and materials to deliver complete turnkey solutions for hotels, restaurants, and schools.
